Our Services

How we teach

We come to you — wherever your child learns best.

💻

Online Sessions

Live 1-on-1 coding lessons delivered online. Flexible scheduling, interactive tools, and personalised projects — from anywhere in the world.

Online · Flexible
🏫

School Programs

We partner with schools to deliver structured coding curricula in the classroom. Suitable for all year groups — no prior experience needed.

Schools · Groups
🏠

Home Visits

Prefer learning at home? We come to you. Your child learns comfortably in their own space with a dedicated Tyzam instructor.

In-person · 1:1
Our Courses

What we teach

From beginner blocks to advanced AI — there's a course for every level.

🐱

Scratch

The perfect starting point. Build games and animations using drag-and-drop blocks.

Beginner
🐍

Python

Learn the world's most popular language. From basic programs to real projects.

All levels
☕

Java

Build powerful applications with one of the most in-demand programming languages.

Intermediate
🌐

Web Development

Design and build real websites using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

Beginner+
🤖

AI & Machine Learning

Understand how AI works and build your own intelligent projects.

Advanced
🔐

Cybersecurity

Stay safe online, understand hacking, and learn how to protect systems.

Intermediate
📱

App Development

Turn your ideas into real mobile apps. Build for iOS and Android.

Intermediate
🎮

Game Development

Design and code your own video games — from concept to playable prototype.

All levels
The Process

How it works

Getting started is simple. We handle everything.

1

Book a class

Fill in the form. Tell us your child's age, interests, and preferred format.

2

We match you

We pair your child with the right course and confirm your session details.

3

Start learning

Your first lesson begins. Personalised, fun, and built around your child's pace.

4

Keep growing

Track progress, level up, and watch your child's confidence soar.

Who We Teach

Built for every learner

Whether it's a curious kid or an entire school — Tyzam has you covered.

🧒

Kids (Under 13)

We make coding fun and approachable for young minds. Scratch, games, and creative projects that spark a love for technology early.

🏫

Schools

We bring structured, curriculum-aligned coding programs directly to your school. Suitable for all year groups and learning levels.

👨‍👩‍👧

Parents

Give your child a head start. Our home visit and online options make it easy to fit learning into any schedule.
